_meta.description: Single source of truth for all per-platform configuration. 40 active platforms.

_assemblyDefaults.notes: Default fallback for platforms not explicitly configured

1.name: Full Shorthand (CLIP-based)
1.description: Supports full CLIP weight syntax, tags, brackets, and all shorthand

2.name: Midjourney Family
2.description: Supports Midjourney-specific weight syntax and parameters

3.name: Natural Language + Universal
3.description: Supports natural language and universal abbreviations only

4.name: Plain Language Only
4.description: Supports only natural language descriptions, no shorthand

123rf.exampleOutput: atmospheric cityscape, warm tones, dramatic lighting
123rf.tips: 123RF AI works best with stock-photo-style descriptions. Be specific about subject and setting.
123rf.platformNote: Consumer-focused stock platform with simplified generation.
123rf.groupKnowledge: Stock photography platform with multiple style engines. NL prose. No special syntax.

adobe-firefly.tips: Firefly auto-suggests as you type. Use style presets in UI rather than text. Clean, clear descriptions.
adobe-firefly.exampleOutput: A portrait of a samurai warrior in a fighting pose with dramatic cinematic lighting in golden hour
adobe-firefly.groupKnowledge: Style auto-detection from prompt text. No artist names allowed. UI presets for content type, lighting, composition.
adobe-firefly.platformNote: Handles descriptive prompts well but can be confused by overly complex instructions.
adobe-firefly.optimizationBenefit: Clearer visual interpretation with moderate length.

artbreeder.exampleOutput: atmospheric cityscape, warm tones, dramatic lighting
artbreeder.tips: Artbreeder works best with very short evocative phrases. Use sliders for fine-tuning.
artbreeder.platformNote: Mixing-focused platform where prompts play secondary role to genetic blending.
artbreeder.optimizationBenefit: Short, targeted prompts work best with mixing workflow.
artbreeder.groupKnowledge: Hybrid platform: text-to-image uses NL prose, Splicer mode uses sliders. SDXL and Flux backends.

artguru.tips: Artguru uses style presets for creative direction. Write clear natural language descriptions.
artguru.exampleOutput: A samurai in a fighting pose under dramatic cinematic lighting, highly detailed armor with intricate patterns
artguru.groupKnowledge: Style-preset driven platform with 30+ presets. No weight syntax exposed. Accepts up to ~500 chars. Separate negative prompt field available.
artguru.platformNote: Style-preset driven. No CLIP syntax. Simple descriptive prose.
artguru.optimizationBenefit: Ensures rich visual anchors survive platform simplification.

artistly.tips: Artistly auto-expands keywords into full descriptions. Supply rich, anchor-dense seed text.
artistly.exampleOutput: A samurai warrior in dramatic fighting pose, cinematic lighting, detailed armor
artistly.groupKnowledge: Natural prose, 100–200 chars. Preserve all visual anchors from the scene description. Use the full character range.
artistly.platformNote: Smart Prompt Enhancer auto-expands input. Preserve all anchors. 100–200 chars.
artistly.optimizationBenefit: Provides richer seed text for auto-expansion.

bing.tips: Bing uses DALL·E. Keep prompts simple and descriptive.
bing.exampleOutput: A dramatic portrait of a samurai warrior in a fighting stance with cinematic golden hour lighting
bing.groupKnowledge: Model selector (DALL-E 3, GPT-4o, MAI-Image-1). ~480 char limit. 5 aspect ratios via UI.

bluewillow.tips: BlueWillow accepts simple natural language via Discord. Keep prompts concise.
bluewillow.exampleOutput: A samurai in a dramatic fighting pose, cinematic lighting, detailed armor
bluewillow.groupKnowledge: Discord-based interface. Very limited parameters (--ar, --no only). Short simple descriptions work best. ~200 chars effective.
bluewillow.platformNote: Discord interface. Very limited params. Short descriptions work best.
bluewillow.optimizationBenefit: Focuses visual anchors within tight effective limit.

canva.tips: Canva works best with short, focused prompts. Use UI style presets.
canva.groupKnowledge: Powered by Leonardo Phoenix. Three output types (image/graphic/video). Style and aspect ratio set via UI controls, not in prompt. Prefers clear descriptive natural language with visual specifics — subject, setting, mood, lighting, colour.
canva.platformNote: Consumer-focused design tool; simple prompts work best.
canva.compressionNotes: Consumer design tool, simple prompts only

clipdrop.tips: ClipDrop uses plain text only. No weight syntax or special formatting.
clipdrop.exampleOutput: A samurai warrior in dramatic fighting pose under cinematic lighting, highly detailed armor
clipdrop.groupKnowledge: SDXL Turbo backend abstracted behind plain text interface. 1000-char API limit. No weights, no special syntax.
clipdrop.platformNote: SDXL Turbo backend. Plain text only, 1000-char API limit.
clipdrop.optimizationBenefit: Prevents wasted tokens on unsupported syntax.

craiyon.tips: Free and simple. Short prompts work best. Don't expect high fidelity.
craiyon.exampleOutput: samurai warrior portrait, fighting, dramatic lighting
craiyon.groupKnowledge: 9 images per generation. Pipe | syntax for concept combining. Raw mode available.
craiyon.platformNote: Simplified DALL-E Mini successor; very short prompts work best.
craiyon.compressionNotes: DALL-E Mini successor, very short prompts

deepai.exampleOutput: portrait of a samurai warrior fighting with dramatic cinematic lighting
deepai.groupKnowledge: Full REST API with negative_prompt parameter. SD-based. NL prose.
deepai.platformNote: Basic API-first generator; simple prompts recommended.
deepai.optimizationBenefit: Better results with focused, minimal prompts.

dreamlike.tips: SD-based. Use quality tags and comprehensive negative prompts.
dreamlike.exampleOutput: masterpiece, best quality, portrait of a samurai, fighting, cinematic lighting, dramatic
dreamlike.groupKnowledge: Fine-tuned SD models. Responds well to artistic style terms.
dreamlike.optimizationBenefit: Prevents style bleeding and token overflow.

dreamstudio.tips: Same as Stability AI. Use SDXL-optimised prompts for best results.
dreamstudio.exampleOutput: masterpiece, portrait of a samurai warrior, fighting stance, cinematic lighting, dramatic atmosphere, 8K
dreamstudio.groupKnowledge: Stability API wrapper. SD3/Ultra/Core strip parenthetical weights. SDXL supports full (term:weight).
dreamstudio.platformNote: Stability AI's flagship interface; same CLIP limits as core SD.
dreamstudio.optimizationBenefit: Critical for preventing token truncation and quality loss.

flux.tips: Flux handles detailed prompts well. Quality keywords like '8K', 'highly detailed' help.
flux.exampleOutput: portrait of a samurai, fighting stance, concept art, cinematic lighting, dramatic, 8K detail
flux.groupKnowledge: T5-XXL encoder, not CLIP. Reads full sentences — prose outperforms tags. No weight syntax. No negative prompts on Flux 1. guidance_scale 3.5 — follows prompt faithfully. Best-in-class photorealism and text rendering.
flux.platformNote: T5 encoder handles longer prompts; still benefits from focused descriptions.
flux.optimizationBenefit: Better coherence with structured, moderate-length prompts.

fotor.tips: Fotor exposes full Stable Diffusion weight syntax. Use CLIP-style tags with quality boosters.
fotor.exampleOutput: (masterpiece:1.3), (best quality:1.2), samurai, fighting pose, (cinematic lighting:1.1), highly detailed armor
fotor.groupKnowledge: Exposes full SD (term:1.3) weight syntax. Separate negative prompt field. CLIP 77-token limit. Quality boosters essential.
fotor.platformNote: Full SD (term:1.3) weight syntax. CLIP 77-token limit. Quality boosters essential.
fotor.optimizationBenefit: Prevents token truncation and ensures weight syntax compliance.

google-imagen.tips: Google Imagen prefers clear, natural descriptions. Keep it concise.
google-imagen.exampleOutput: A dramatic portrait of a samurai warrior in a fighting stance with cinematic lighting during golden hour
google-imagen.groupKnowledge: Expressive Chips for style. Seed lock toggle. Prompt rewriting enabled by default.
google-imagen.platformNote: Concise prompts yield cleaner outputs; handles natural language well.

hotpot.tips: Simple interface. Short, focused prompts work best.
hotpot.exampleOutput: samurai warrior portrait, fighting, dramatic lighting, cinematic style
hotpot.platformNote: Marketing graphics focus; clear, targeted prompts preferred.
hotpot.optimizationBenefit: Cleaner commercial outputs with focused prompts.
hotpot.groupKnowledge: 180+ style presets do the creative work. SDXL backbone abstracted away. 380-char limit.

ideogram.tips: Ideogram excels at text in images. Include text requirements clearly.
ideogram.exampleOutput: A dramatic portrait of a samurai warrior, fighting stance, cinematic lighting, golden hour, without blur
ideogram.groupKnowledge: Industry leader for text-in-image rendering. Quoted text in prompt appears in image. Magic Prompt rewrites input (like DALL-E). Design-focused model understands typography, kerning, composition grids. ~150-160 word limit. Inline negatives via 'without X' unreliable.
ideogram.platformNote: Excels at text-in-image; focused prompts improve text rendering accuracy.
ideogram.optimizationBenefit: Better typography clarity with targeted descriptions.

imagine-meta.tips: Meta Imagine prefers clear, simple descriptions.
imagine-meta.exampleOutput: A portrait of a samurai warrior fighting with dramatic lighting at golden hour
imagine-meta.groupKnowledge: Meta Emu model. NL prose. No special syntax. Square output only.
imagine-meta.platformNote: Llama-based natural language processing; handles conversational prompts well.
imagine-meta.optimizationBenefit: More coherent results with structured descriptions.

jasper-art.tips: Jasper Art uses SD-based generation. Quality tags and negative prompts help.
jasper-art.exampleOutput: masterpiece, best quality, portrait of a samurai, fighting, cinematic lighting, dramatic
jasper-art.groupKnowledge: DALL-E 2 wrapper. 400 char limit. Mood/medium/style dropdowns available.
jasper-art.platformNote: Marketing-focused SD variant; clear commercial prompts preferred.
jasper-art.optimizationBenefit: Better brand-safe outputs with focused descriptions.

kling.exampleOutput: A samurai warrior standing in a bamboo forest, cinematic lighting, mist rising from the ground, photorealistic
kling.tips: Kling excels at cinematic compositions and character consistency. Keep prompts descriptive with subject + action + context + style.
kling.groupKnowledge: Video-first platform. Supports Shot 1:/Shot 2: multi-shot storyboard syntax. Supports negative prompts via separate field. Strong character consistency. Camera movement and cinematic direction language preferred.
kling.compressionNotes: Video platform. 2500-char limit. Shot 1:/Shot 2: multi-shot. Separate negative field.

leonardo.tips: Use weighting for emphasis (concept::1.5). Choose appropriate model for style.
leonardo.exampleOutput: portrait of a samurai::1.2, fighting, cinematic lighting, dramatic mood, concept art, highly detailed
leonardo.groupKnowledge: CLIP encoder with double-colon weight syntax term::weight. "Elements" = LoRAs (max 4, combined weight ≤1.00). ~1,000-char limit. Front-loading emphasis critical.
leonardo.platformNote: SD-based with multiple fine-tuned models; CLIP 77-token limit applies.
leonardo.optimizationBenefit: Critical for game/concept art quality and style consistency.

lexica.tips: SD-based. Use quality tags and comprehensive negative prompts.
lexica.exampleOutput: masterpiece, portrait of a samurai, fighting pose, cinematic lighting, dramatic, highly detailed
lexica.groupKnowledge: Aperture v4 model. Responds well to photographic terms. Front-load camera and lens references.
lexica.optimizationBenefit: Prevents token truncation and improves style matching.

luma-ai.exampleOutput: A close-up portrait in natural light, shallow depth of field, soft bokeh background, photorealistic skin texture
luma-ai.tips: Luma Photon excels at photorealism. Natural language descriptions outperform keyword lists. Specify lighting and camera details.
luma-ai.groupKnowledge: Video-first platform. Supports @style keyword for style references and loop keyword for looping clips. No negative prompts. Conversational natural language preferred. Excels at photorealistic motion.
luma-ai.compressionNotes: Video platform (Dream Machine). 3000-5000 char API limit. No negatives. @style keyword.

microsoft-designer.tips: Microsoft Designer uses DALL·E. Keep prompts simple and descriptive.
microsoft-designer.exampleOutput: A dramatic portrait of a samurai warrior in a fighting stance with cinematic golden hour lighting
microsoft-designer.groupKnowledge: Bracket templates [color], [animal], [style] for guided creation. Design workflow integration.
microsoft-designer.platformNote: Template-first workflow; concise prompts integrate better.
microsoft-designer.optimizationBenefit: Cleaner template integration with focused prompts.

midjourney.tips: Short, punchy keywords work best. Style and mood early. Use --no sparingly.
midjourney.exampleOutput: portrait of a samurai, fighting, cinematic lighting, dramatic mood, golden hour --no blur --no text
midjourney.groupKnowledge: Proprietary encoder. :: multi-prompt weighting, --ar/--v/--s/--no parameter flags. Prose sections, not keywords. ~40 words effective influence. Excels at atmosphere, mood, cinematic compositions.
midjourney.platformNote: Tokens near the front are weighted more heavily. Quality remains high even with long prompts, but focus improves results.

myedit.exampleOutput: atmospheric cityscape, warm tones, dramatic lighting
myedit.tips: CyberLink MyEdit works best with short, focused prompts.
myedit.platformNote: CyberLink consumer tool; simple prompts preferred.
myedit.groupKnowledge: Nano Banana Pro (Google) backend. NL prose. No special syntax.

novelai.tips: Use curly braces for emphasis: {{{important}}}. More braces = more emphasis.
novelai.exampleOutput: {{{masterpiece}}}, {{best quality}}, portrait of a samurai, fighting, cinematic lighting, dramatic
novelai.groupKnowledge: Anime-optimised SD with CLIP encoder. Uses {{{term}}} triple-brace weighting (NOT parenthetical). Tag-based prompting, not prose. Quality prefix required: {{{masterpiece}}}, {{best quality}}. 77-token CLIP limit per chunk. Danbooru-style tags produce best results.
novelai.platformNote: Anime-optimized SD; CLIP limits apply. Tag-style prompts work best.
novelai.optimizationBenefit: Critical for anime style consistency and character accuracy.
novelai.compressionNotes: Anime-optimized, uses {} for weights, booru tags

openai.tips: DALL·E prefers full sentences. Avoid technical jargon. Be descriptive.
openai.exampleOutput: A portrait of a samurai warrior in a fighting stance with dramatic cinematic lighting, golden hour atmosphere, without blur or text
openai.groupKnowledge: DALL-E 3 via GPT-4 rewriting. Quality (standard/hd) and style (vivid/natural) are API params — do not include in prompt. Prompt is always rewritten by GPT-4 before generation.
openai.platformNote: DALL-E 3 handles long prompts well via GPT-4 preprocessing. Still benefits from clarity.
openai.optimizationBenefit: Clearer visual interpretation with focused descriptions.

photoleap.exampleOutput: atmospheric cityscape, warm tones, dramatic lighting
photoleap.tips: Photoleap is mobile-first — use short, punchy prompts focused on subject and style.
photoleap.groupKnowledge: Mobile-first SD-based platform. NL prose. No special syntax.
photoleap.platformNote: Mobile-first editing app; concise prompts work best.

picsart.tips: Mobile-first. Short, impactful prompts work best.
picsart.exampleOutput: samurai warrior portrait, fighting, dramatic lighting, cinematic
picsart.groupKnowledge: 90+ models via AI Playground. NL prose. No special syntax.
picsart.platformNote: Mobile-first platform; concise prompts integrate better with editing workflow.
picsart.optimizationBenefit: Cleaner results for social content creation.

picwish.exampleOutput: atmospheric cityscape, warm tones, dramatic lighting
picwish.tips: PicWish works best with simple, clear descriptions.
picwish.platformNote: Enhancement-focused utility; prompts play secondary role.
picwish.groupKnowledge: Editor-first platform with text-to-image. NL prose. No special syntax.

pixlr.exampleOutput: atmospheric cityscape, warm tones, dramatic lighting
pixlr.tips: Pixlr AI responds to concise natural language descriptions.
pixlr.platformNote: Lightweight editor with basic generation; short prompts work well.
pixlr.groupKnowledge: Three generation modes (Fast/Pro/Ultra). Negative prompt field available. NL prose.

playground.tips: Playground v3 reads natural language. Use descriptive prose, not keyword lists.
playground.exampleOutput: A samurai warrior standing in a dramatic fighting pose under intense cinematic side-lighting, wearing intricately detailed traditional armor
playground.groupKnowledge: PGv3 uses LLM-integrated encoder (Llama3-8B). Supports hex colour codes in prompts. Very long token capacity. Natural language prose preferred.
playground.platformNote: PGv3 LLM-integrated encoder. Long token capacity. Prose preferred.
playground.optimizationBenefit: Leverages long context window for richer scene descriptions.

recraft.exampleOutput: A clean vector illustration of a lighthouse on a rocky coast, flat design, warm sunset tones, minimal background
recraft.tips: Recraft excels at vector art, design, and text in images. Use structured prompts: style + subject + detail + background.
recraft.groupKnowledge: Design-first platform with SVG vector output capability. Hierarchical style/substyle taxonomy (25+ options). Text positioning control. 'Artistic level' slider inverts — lower = more prompt adherence. Excels at vector art, icons, logos, illustrations. Separate negative prompt field supported.
recraft.compressionNotes: Design-first platform with SVG vector output. Separate negative field.

runway.tips: Runway excels at video concepts. Think in motion and atmosphere.
runway.exampleOutput: portrait of a samurai warrior, fighting, dramatic cinematic lighting, golden hour, atmospheric
runway.groupKnowledge: Video-first platform. Supports [00:01] timestamp syntax for timed events. No negative prompts. Camera movement language critical. 4-10 second clips. Concise directive prompts preferred.
runway.platformNote: Multi-modal platform; concise prompts recommended for image generation.
runway.optimizationBenefit: Better results with focused visual descriptions.

simplified.exampleOutput: atmospheric cityscape, warm tones, dramatic lighting
simplified.tips: Simplified works well with marketing-focused descriptions.
simplified.platformNote: Marketing-focused design tool; clear commercial prompts work best.
simplified.optimizationBenefit: Better brand-safe outputs with focused descriptions.
simplified.groupKnowledge: 14+ model aggregator. NL prose across all models. Negative prompts on some models.

stability.tips: Use quality boosters: masterpiece, best quality, highly detailed. Comprehensive negative prompts improve output.
stability.exampleOutput: masterpiece, best quality, portrait of a samurai, fighting, concept art, cinematic lighting, dramatic
stability.groupKnowledge: Canonical CLIP platform. 77-token CLIP limit per chunk. Quality boosters essential. Front-load subject in first chunk.
stability.platformNote: CLIP 77-token hard limit. Excess tokens are ignored or cause bleeding between concepts.
stability.optimizationBenefit: Critical for image quality. Prevents truncation and style bleeding.

visme.exampleOutput: atmospheric cityscape, warm tones, dramatic lighting
visme.tips: Visme works best with clear, presentation-ready descriptions.
visme.platformNote: Presentation-focused tool; brief prompts integrate better.
visme.optimizationBenefit: Cleaner slide integration with simple prompts.
visme.groupKnowledge: Dreamscape API (SD variant) backend. NL prose. No special syntax.

vistacreate.exampleOutput: atmospheric cityscape, warm tones, dramatic lighting
vistacreate.tips: VistaCreate responds to focused visual descriptions with mood and colour.
vistacreate.platformNote: Template-based design tool; simple prompts work best.
vistacreate.optimizationBenefit: Better template integration with focused prompts.
vistacreate.groupKnowledge: Bria.ai backend. NL prose. ~3000 chars capacity. No special syntax.
